RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Resilient
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You shrug off blows that would fell others. Take 10% less damage from all sources.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Ironhide
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your skin turns blades. Better sharp and blunt armour, and a little less damage taken.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Duelist
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: A master of the blade-dance. Your melee strikes land truer and you slip more blows.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Deadeye
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Preternaturally steady aim — better ranged accuracy and faster shots.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: War Caster
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You channel even amid the chaos of battle. Your spells hit noticeably harder.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Spell Focus
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Long study sharpens your craft. Your spells hit harder still.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Fleet
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Light and quick on your feet — a marked boost to movement.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Lucky
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Fortune favours you — a little better at dodging, working, and holding your nerve.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Prodigy
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: A quick study — you work and learn markedly faster.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Stalwart
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Iron of will and constitution — harder to break, and you fight off illness faster.
